appearance.description: A short human woman who often wears clerical charms, colors, or priestess robes even where religion is outlawed. Her body language is guarded and flinchy, but she still moves to protect anyone smaller than her.

personality: "I don't deserve protection." The joy and sparkle in her eyes are almost gone. She is constantly scared, jumpy, quiet, and soft-spoken. She compulsively overhelps and overexerts herself until it hurts her. Taller people approaching make her flinch every time; smaller people make her step in front of them, sometimes even as if defending them from her own allies.
backstory: Seraphine refuses to give her real name, or may have forgotten it. She appeared one day with very little explanation. She is fanatical about religion and the old ways, even in a land hostile to religion, healing, and the supernatural. She has taken a self-imposed vow against violence, yet forces herself to watch the finishing blow. Some people think she is only playing at being a cleric; the supernatural survival around her suggests otherwise. Whatever trauma broke her happened recently and hit hard.
notes: Fiction-first sheet: Seraphine can carry a broader cleric/story spell list than strict D&D preparation would normally allow. Use Prepared/Available/Mark Spell/Story Permission chips to decide what is ready, what is known, and what needs DM/story permission. Fading Grace is intentionally marked as undefined until its exact quirk rules are written.

abilities.name: Dragonmark of Sentinel
abilities.description: Protective dragonmark package. CON +2 and WIS +1 are already included in stats. Adds Sentinel's Intuition, Guardian's Shield, Vigilant Guardian, and expanded Mark spells.

mechanics.label: CON +2 / WIS +1
mechanics.description: Already folded into the displayed ability scores.

mechanics.label: Mark Spells
mechanics.description: Adds protective spells such as Shield, Compelled Duel, Counterspell, and Bigby's Hand to her usable list.

abilities.name: Sentinel's Intuition
abilities.description: When she makes a Wisdom (Insight) or Wisdom (Perception) check, she can roll a d4 and add it to the ability check.

mechanics.label: +1d4
mechanics.description: Add 1d4 to Wisdom Insight or Perception checks.

abilities.name: Guardian's Shield
abilities.description: She can cast Shield once with this trait and regains the ability after finishing a long rest. Wisdom is the spellcasting ability for it.

mechanics.label: 1 / Long Rest
mechanics.description: Recharge on long rest.

mechanics.label: +5 AC reaction
mechanics.description: Uses the Shield spell timing/effect.

abilities.name: Vigilant Guardian
abilities.description: When a creature she can see within 5 feet is hit by an attack roll, she can use her reaction to swap places with that creature and be hit instead. Once per long rest.

mechanics.label: Take the Hit
mechanics.description: Seraphine becomes the target and suffers the hit instead.

abilities.name: Fading Grace
abilities.description: Unfinished quirk responsible for Seraphine supernaturally beating the odds in a land hostile to healing, religion, and the supernatural. Exact mechanics still need to be defined.

mechanics.label: Undefined
mechanics.description: Needs final mechanical rules before it should be used as a hard combat feature.

mechanics.label: Survival Miracle
mechanics.description: Explains improbable survival, healing, and divine grace themes.

abilities.name: Self-Imposed Vow Against Violence
abilities.description: She refuses violence for herself, but still forces herself to witness the finishing blow. Use this as an RP constraint and possible stress trigger, not as a hard spellcasting ban.

mechanics.label: Stress Trigger
mechanics.description: Watching violence or being unable to protect someone can worsen her fear and overhelping.

inventory.name: Clerical Charms and Colors
inventory.description: Small religious charms, colors, and devotional markers worn even where religion is outlawed.

mechanics.label: Visible Faith
mechanics.description: Can attract dangerous attention in places where religion is outlawed.

inventory.name: Priestess Robes
inventory.description: Full clerical robes or improvised priestess clothing. More symbolic than armored.

mechanics.label: Unarmored Symbol
mechanics.description: AC 16 is currently assumed from non-detailed protective gear or story calculator, not from these robes alone.

mechanics.label: Long Rest
mechanics.description: Restores after a long rest.

mechanics.label: Long Rest
mechanics.description: Restores after a long rest.

mechanics.label: RP Stress
mechanics.description: Optional tracker for self-harm by overexertion, panic, or compulsive protection.

log.reason: Base HP calculator: 9 starting Cleric + 48 from 8 subsequent levels.

acModes.label: Assumed AC
acModes.formula: Discord sheet says AC 16?; armor/shield details not yet specified.

feats.name: Dragonmark of Sentinel
feats.description: Protective mark granting Sentinel's Intuition, Guardian's Shield, Vigilant Guardian, and expanded spell access.

calculations.notes: Cleric 9. Prepared spell count is intentionally not enforced; the sheet separates Prepared from Available/Story Permission instead.
